programme.title: CLASSIC MATCH 13/14 LIV v MNC
programme.sub-title: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2013/2014 season.

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON 2013/2014 (MNC)
programme.sub-title: A review of all the best goals, action and drama from Premier League seasons past.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW30 Newcastle United v West Ham United
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW30 Manchester City v Arsenal
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP51: CHAMPIONS SPECIAL
programme.sub-title: Season 2023 - 2024 has arguably been the greatest since the birth of the Premier League in 1992. Three elite teams racing to the finish line. Each of them believing this season will end in glory. The script of the story is captivating. Manchester City going for an historic fourth consecutive Premier League title. Arsenal looking for their first title in twenty years following their late season collapse in 2023. Liverpool looking to give their manager Jurgen Klopp the perfect send off as he says good-bye to Anfield after nine years. With the help of leading celebrity fans, the managers and senior players each twist and turn of the season is highlighted. The narrative of the season is like no other. The Champions Story 2023 - 2024 tells a very special story.

programme.title: PL REWIND EP28: MCI v ARS 09/10
programme.sub-title: PL Rewind delves back into the Premier League archive to showcase some memorable matches with players and managers who were key to that game. Talking us through behind-the-scenes stories and major on-pitch moments in true 'directors-commentary' style. With guests Shaun Wright-Phillips and Shay Given.

programme.title: PL REWIND EP34: TOT v ARS 98/99
programme.sub-title: Joining Steve Bower on PL Rewind this week are former Arsenal stars Emmanuel Petit and Nigel Winterburn, as they revisit a classic North London Derby from the 1998/99 campaign.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP50: (Subbed) ANGE POSTECOGLOU
programme.sub-title: From humble beginnings as a footballer in Melbourne to becoming Tottenham’s manager, we chart the meteoric rise of Australian Ange Postecoglou. We speak to those that knew him best to find out what makes him tick and delve into his unique coaching style that has brought him success wherever he’s been.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW30 Newcastle United v West Ham United
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW30 Manchester City v Arsenal
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: CLASSIC MATCH 13/14 MNC v ARS
programme.sub-title: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2013/2014 season.

programme.title: PL REWIND EP28: PL RAW SPECIAL #4
programme.sub-title: This week on Rewind we look back at some fantastic action through the PL RAW Lens: fixtures include a west London Derby between Chelsea and Fulham, and a six-goal thriller at Anfield as Liverpool hosted Newcastle.

programme.title: FANTASY SHOW FRI 09 AUG
programme.sub-title: With a week to go before the 2024/25 Premier League season kicks off, this special Fantasy Show gives FPL managers insight into the new rules for the upcoming campaign and provides a detailed overview on which stars you should be putting in your teams.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP10: IPSWICH TOWN
programme.sub-title: In the first senior manager’s job of his career, Kieran McKenna has achieved something nobody else has managed this decade: Winning back-to-back promotions from League One to the Premier League, in the process ending Ipswich’s 22-year absence from top flight football. We go behind the scenes with the team as they prepare for the opening game of the new season whilst also exploring the club’s unique history.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP07: FERGIE v WENGER
programme.sub-title: Widely regarded as the two best managers in Premier League history, Sir Alex Ferguson and Arsene Wenger went toe to toe on the touchline on numerous occasions over the years. But what made their rivalry so fierce? We take a look at the intense clashes, memorable moments on and off the pitch and the monumental impact their duels had on English football's modern era.

programme.title: WELCOME TO THE WEEKEND Best Of Welcome To The Weekend #4
programme.sub-title: The Welcome to the Weekend team showcase their best bits from the 23/24 season. Hollywood superstars Bryan Cranston and Bryce Dallas Howard guess what happens next with some iconic Premier League moments, Eberechi Eze and Jean-Phillipe Mateta play out an epic game of Target Practice plus Nigerian musician Kcee brings the vibes to the studio.

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON 2023/2024 (MNC)
programme.sub-title: The 2023/24 Premier League season will be forever remembered as one of the greatest campaigns ever. From an absorbing title race, Jürgen Klopp leaving Liverpool to Luton living the dream in the top-flight – Review of the Season documents all of the thrilling stories to emerge across the 380 matches.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP51: CHAMPIONS SPECIAL
programme.sub-title: Season 2023 - 2024 has arguably been the greatest since the birth of the Premier League in 1992. Three elite teams racing to the finish line. Each of them believing this season will end in glory. The script of the story is captivating. Manchester City going for an historic fourth consecutive Premier League title. Arsenal looking for their first title in twenty years following their late season collapse in 2023. Liverpool looking to give their manager Jurgen Klopp the perfect send off as he says good-bye to Anfield after nine years. With the help of leading celebrity fans, the managers and senior players each twist and turn of the season is highlighted. The narrative of the season is like no other. The Champions Story 2023 - 2024 tells a very special story.

programme.title: FANTASY SHOW FRI 09 AUG
programme.sub-title: Kelly Somers is joined in studio by FPL experts to crunch the numbers and give their opinions on which Premier League stars you should be selecting ahead of GW1.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP11: (Subbed) ERLING HAALAND
programme.sub-title: He’s only been at Manchester City for one year, but striker Erling Haaland has already sent records tumbling in the Premier League. We join the 23-year-old in his native Norway to reflect on his blockbuster season and catch up with his father and former Man City player Alfie to show how the youngster is coping as footballs hottest property!

programme.title: GOALS OF THE SEASON 2023/2024 (GB: HAALAND)
programme.sub-title: From free kicks to bicycle kicks, relive some of the most memorable strikes from 2023/24 in a Premier League season where there’s been a record number of goals scored.

programme.title: WELCOME TO THE WEEKEND Best Of Welcome To The Weekend #4
programme.sub-title: The Welcome to the Weekend team showcase their best bits from the 23/24 season. Hollywood superstars Bryan Cranston and Bryce Dallas Howard guess what happens next with some iconic Premier League moments, Eberechi Eze and Jean-Phillipe Mateta play out an epic game of Target Practice plus Nigerian musician Kcee brings the vibes to the studio.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP09: (Subbed) HWANG HEE-CHAN
programme.sub-title: Hwang Hee-chan has risen through the ranks in the English Premier League over the last few seasons and has become a Wolves fans favourite. Premier League Stories recently went behind the scenes to experience a day in the life of this burgeoning South Korean star, who will once again be a key player in his clubs Premier League plans.

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON 2023/2024 (MNC)
programme.sub-title: The 2023/24 Premier League season will be forever remembered as one of the greatest campaigns ever. From an absorbing title race, Jürgen Klopp leaving Liverpool to Luton living the dream in the top-flight – Review of the Season documents all of the thrilling stories to emerge across the 380 matches.

programme.title: FANTASY SHOW FRI 09 AUG
programme.sub-title: Kelly Somers is joined in studio by FPL experts to crunch the numbers and give their opinions on which Premier League stars you should be selecting ahead of GW1.

programme.title: PREVIEW OF THE SEASON 2024/2025
programme.sub-title: As the excitement and anticipation builds ahead of the new Premier League campaign, get a detailed overview of how all 20 clubs are set – offering insight and analysis on new signings, newly promoted teams and much, much more. Preview of the Season is the perfect guide to what awaits all Premier League fans.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP10: IPSWICH TOWN
programme.sub-title: In the first senior manager’s job of his career, Kieran McKenna has achieved something nobody else has managed this decade: Winning back-to-back promotions from League One to the Premier League, in the process ending Ipswich’s 22-year absence from top flight football. We go behind the scenes with the team as they prepare for the opening game of the new season whilst also exploring the club’s unique history.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP05: BLACKPOOL - THE IMPOSSIBLE DREAM
programme.sub-title: We talk to the cast of characters who helped Blackpool reach the dizzy heights of the Premier League in the 2010-11 season. With some hilarious anecdotes and unexpected tales, we hear from the team of lower league misfits, led by the charismatic Ian Holloway on how they fought against all the odds and so nearly confounded their critics.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW31 Chelsea v Manchester United
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW31 Manchester City v Aston Villa
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: WELCOME TO THE WEEKEND Best Of Welcome To The Weekend #4
programme.sub-title: The Welcome to the Weekend team showcase their best bits from the 23/24 season. Hollywood superstars Bryan Cranston and Bryce Dallas Howard guess what happens next with some iconic Premier League moments, Eberechi Eze and Jean-Phillipe Mateta play out an epic game of Target Practice plus Nigerian musician Kcee brings the vibes to the studio.

programme.title: PREVIEW OF THE SEASON 2024/2025
programme.sub-title: As the excitement and anticipation builds ahead of the new Premier League campaign, get a detailed overview of how all 20 clubs are set – offering insight and analysis on new signings, newly promoted teams and much, much more. Preview of the Season is the perfect guide to what awaits all Premier League fans.

programme.title: FANTASY SHOW FRI 09 AUG
programme.sub-title: Kelly Somers is joined in studio by FPL experts to crunch the numbers and give their opinions on which Premier League stars you should be selecting ahead of GW1.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP43: (Subbed) FOXES FANTASY WORLD
programme.sub-title: After watching their already relegated side lose to the Invincibles on the last day of the 2003/4 Premier League season, some Leicester City fans stayed behind to watch Arsenal lift the trophy at Highbury. Those fans endured ten years in the wilderness, only for Leicester to return to the big time and embark on a rollercoaster couple of years. In that time they completed the great escape after being dead and buried at the foot of the table and then followed that up with the most unthinkable of Premier League triumphs. This is their story, one of sports greatest triumphs, told by those who wrote it.

programme.title: MY SEASON JAMIE VARDY: 15/16
programme.sub-title: A look at a Premier League season through the eyes of Jamie Vardy who excelled in 2015/2016. The highs and lows and everything in between, that made it a memorable and at times defining nine months for both Vardy and Leicester City.

programme.title: MY SEASON LUIS SUAREZ: 13/14
programme.sub-title: A look at a Premier League season through the eyes of Luis Suarez who excelled in 2013/2014. The highs and lows and everything in between, that made it a memorable and at times defining nine months for both Suarez and Liverpool.

programme.title: 1-TO-11 EP04: STEVE MCMANAMAN'S ALL-TIME LIVERPOOL 1-TO-11
programme.sub-title: Liverpool legend Steve McManaman, joins Will Perry to unveil his ultimate all-time Liverpool XI. In a rapid-fire discussion, he picks some of the most iconic Liverpool players, revealing a dream team lineup that embodies the club's historic greatness.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP10: IPSWICH TOWN
programme.sub-title: In the first senior manager’s job of his career, Kieran McKenna has achieved something nobody else has managed this decade: Winning back-to-back promotions from League One to the Premier League, in the process ending Ipswich’s 22-year absence from top flight football. We go behind the scenes with the team as they prepare for the opening game of the new season whilst also exploring the club’s unique history.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP08: (Subbed) PREMIER LEAGUE MAVERICKS
programme.sub-title: We delve into the careers of some of the most enigmatic and unpredictable footballers to have graced the English top-flight in recent years and find out how they became ‘Premier League mavericks’. We get under the skin of what made these players notorious, controversial and flamboyant and the impact they had in their time in England.

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON 2023/2024 (MNC)
programme.sub-title: The 2023/24 Premier League season will be forever remembered as one of the greatest campaigns ever. From an absorbing title race, Jürgen Klopp leaving Liverpool to Luton living the dream in the top-flight – Review of the Season documents all of the thrilling stories to emerge across the 380 matches.

programme.title: PREVIEW OF THE SEASON 2024/2025
programme.sub-title: As the excitement and anticipation builds ahead of the new Premier League campaign, get a detailed overview of how all 20 clubs are set – offering insight and analysis on new signings, newly promoted teams and much, much more. Preview of the Season is the perfect guide to what awaits all Premier League fans.

programme.title: WELCOME TO THE WEEKEND Best Of Welcome To The Weekend #4
programme.sub-title: The Welcome to the Weekend team showcase their best bits from the 23/24 season. Hollywood superstars Bryan Cranston and Bryce Dallas Howard guess what happens next with some iconic Premier League moments, Eberechi Eze and Jean-Phillipe Mateta play out an epic game of Target Practice plus Nigerian musician Kcee brings the vibes to the studio.

programme.title: GOALS OF THE SEASON 2023/2024 (GB: HAALAND)
programme.sub-title: From free kicks to bicycle kicks, relive some of the most memorable strikes from 2023/24 in a Premier League season where there’s been a record number of goals scored.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP10: IPSWICH TOWN
programme.sub-title: In the first senior manager’s job of his career, Kieran McKenna has achieved something nobody else has managed this decade: Winning back-to-back promotions from League One to the Premier League, in the process ending Ipswich’s 22-year absence from top flight football. We go behind the scenes with the team as they prepare for the opening game of the new season whilst also exploring the club’s unique history.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP06: THE ENTERTAINERS
programme.sub-title: Nicknamed ‘The Entertainers’, Kevin Keegan’s Newcastle team of the 1995-96 season set the Premier League alight with their confidence and flair that took them agonisingly close to winning their first Premier League title. In this show, we speak to those that were part of that incredible journey and reflect on some of those unforgettable moments that captured hearts and forever changing the club's legacy.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS EP09: THIERRY HENRY'S TOP 10 PL MOMENTS
programme.sub-title: Arguably the greatest striker the Premier League has ever seen, Thierry Henry sits down with Will Perry to reveal his Top 10 Premier League Moments.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP51: CHAMPIONS SPECIAL
programme.sub-title: Season 2023 - 2024 has arguably been the greatest since the birth of the Premier League in 1992. Three elite teams racing to the finish line. Each of them believing this season will end in glory. The script of the story is captivating. Manchester City going for an historic fourth consecutive Premier League title. Arsenal looking for their first title in twenty years following their late season collapse in 2023. Liverpool looking to give their manager Jurgen Klopp the perfect send off as he says good-bye to Anfield after nine years. With the help of leading celebrity fans, the managers and senior players each twist and turn of the season is highlighted. The narrative of the season is like no other. The Champions Story 2023 - 2024 tells a very special story.

programme.title: PREVIEW OF THE SEASON 2024/2025
programme.sub-title: As the excitement and anticipation builds ahead of the new Premier League campaign, get a detailed overview of how all 20 clubs are set – offering insight and analysis on new signings, newly promoted teams and much, much more. Preview of the Season is the perfect guide to what awaits all Premier League fans.

programme.sub-title: Kelly Somers is joined in studio by FPL experts to crunch the numbers and give their opinions on which Premier League stars you should be selecting ahead of GW1.

programme.sub-title: After watching their already relegated side lose to the Invincibles on the last day of the 2003/4 Premier League season, some Leicester City fans stayed behind to watch Arsenal lift the trophy at Highbury. Those fans endured ten years in the wilderness, only for Leicester to return to the big time and embark on a rollercoaster couple of years. In that time they completed the great escape after being dead and buried at the foot of the table and then followed that up with the most unthinkable of Premier League triumphs. This is their story, one of sports greatest triumphs, told by those who wrote it.

programme.title: MY SEASON JAMIE VARDY: 15/16
programme.sub-title: A look at a Premier League season through the eyes of Jamie Vardy who excelled in 2015/2016. The highs and lows and everything in between, that made it a memorable and at times defining nine months for both Vardy and Leicester City.

programme.sub-title: Liverpool legend Steve McManaman, joins Will Perry to unveil his ultimate all-time Liverpool XI. In a rapid-fire discussion, he picks some of the most iconic Liverpool players, revealing a dream team lineup that embodies the club's historic greatness.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP10: IPSWICH TOWN
programme.sub-title: In the first senior manager’s job of his career, Kieran McKenna has achieved something nobody else has managed this decade: Winning back-to-back promotions from League One to the Premier League, in the process ending Ipswich’s 22-year absence from top flight football. We go behind the scenes with the team as they prepare for the opening game of the new season whilst also exploring the club’s unique history.

We get under the skin of what made these players notorious, controversial and flamboyant and the impact they had in their time in England.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP06: THE ENTERTAINERS
programme.sub-title: Nicknamed ‘The Entertainers’, Kevin Keegan’s Newcastle team of the 1995-96 season set the Premier League alight with their confidence and flair that took them agonisingly close to winning their first Premier League title. In this show, we speak to those that were part of that incredible journey and reflect on some of those unforgettable moments that captured hearts and forever changing the club's legacy.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS EP09: THIERRY HENRY'S TOP 10 PL MOMENTS
programme.sub-title: Arguably the greatest striker the Premier League has ever seen, Thierry Henry sits down with Will Perry to reveal his Top 10 Premier League Moments.

programme.title: PREVIEW OF THE SEASON 2024/2025
programme.sub-title: As the excitement and anticipation builds ahead of the new Premier League campaign, get a detailed overview of how all 20 clubs are set – offering insight and analysis on new signings, newly promoted teams and much, much more. programme.title: WELCOME TO THE WEEKEND Best Of Welcome To The Weekend #4
programme.sub-title: The Welcome to the Weekend team showcase their best bits from the 23/24 season. Hollywood superstars Bryan Cranston and Bryce Dallas Howard guess what happens next with some iconic Premier League moments, Eberechi Eze and Jean-Phillipe Mateta play out an epic game of Target Practice plus Nigerian musician Kcee brings the vibes to the studio.

programme.title: WELCOME TO THE WEEKEND Best Of Welcome To The Weekend #3
programme.sub-title: The Welcome to the Weekend team showcase their best bits from the 23/24 season. Olivia builds Lego with Brentford captain Christian Norgaard, Amadou Onana ranks some of his freshest fits and JJ is on the golf course with Luton’s Carlton Morris and Tom Lockyer.

programme.title: WELCOME TO THE WEEKEND Best Of Welcome To The Weekend #2
programme.sub-title: The Welcome to the Weekend team showcase their best bits from the 23/24 season. We’re with Jonny Evans’ hometown club in Belfast as Greenisland FC attempt a Bruno Fernandes goal recreation, Taiwo Awoniyi and Serge Aurier cook up a storm plus Andrew is presented with hilarious imagery from his AI yearbook.

programme.title: WELCOME TO THE WEEKEND Best Of Welcome To The Weekend #1
programme.sub-title: The Welcome to the Weekend team showcase their best bits from the 23/24 season. James Maddison and Micky van de Ven go head-to-head on the dartboard, musician Declan McKenna performs for Tottenham captain Son Heung-Min plus a comedian who went viral for his slow-mo celebration joins us on the show.

programme.title: PREVIEW OF THE SEASON 2024/2025
programme.sub-title: As the excitement and anticipation builds ahead of the new Premier League campaign, get a detailed overview of how all 20 clubs are set – offering insight and analysis on new signings, newly promoted teams and much, much more. Preview of the Season is the perfect guide to what awaits all Premier League fans.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP10: IPSWICH TOWN
programme.sub-title: In the first senior manager’s job of his career, Kieran McKenna has achieved something nobody else has managed this decade: Winning back-to-back promotions from League One to the Premier League, in the process ending Ipswich’s 22-year absence from top flight football. We go behind the scenes with the team as they prepare for the opening game of the new season whilst also exploring the club’s unique history.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP08: (Subbed) PREMIER LEAGUE MAVERICKS
programme.sub-title: We delve into the careers of some of the most enigmatic and unpredictable footballers to have graced the English top-flight in recent years and find out how they became ‘Premier League mavericks’. We get under the skin of what made these players notorious, controversial and flamboyant and the impact they had in their time in England.

programme.title: GOALS OF THE SEASON 2023/2024 (GB: HAALAND)
programme.sub-title: From free kicks to bicycle kicks, relive some of the most memorable strikes from 2023/24 in a Premier League season where there’s been a record number of goals scored.

programme.title: THE ART OF... EP01: THE MODERN FORWARD
programme.sub-title: Will Perry is joined in the Tech Zone by John Hartson and Karen Carney to analyse the evolution of goalscorers and dig deep into just what makes the modern forward tick.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP11: (Subbed) ERLING HAALAND
programme.sub-title: He’s only been at Manchester City for one year, but striker Erling Haaland has already sent records tumbling in the Premier League. We join the 23-year-old in his native Norway to reflect on his blockbuster season and catch up with his father and former Man City player Alfie to show how the youngster is coping as footballs hottest property!

programme.title: FANTASY SHOW FRI 09 AUG
programme.sub-title: Kelly Somers is joined in studio by FPL experts to crunch the numbers and give their opinions on which Premier League stars you should be selecting ahead of GW1.

programme.sub-title: He’s only been at Manchester City for one year, but striker Erling Haaland has already sent records tumbling in the Premier League. We join the 23-year-old in his native Norway to reflect on his blockbuster season and catch up with his father and former Man City player Alfie to show how the youngster is coping as footballs hottest property!

programme.title: PL STORIES EP10: IPSWICH TOWN
programme.sub-title: In the first senior manager’s job of his career, Kieran McKenna has achieved something nobody else has managed this decade: Winning back-to-back promotions from League One to the Premier League, in the process ending Ipswich’s 22-year absence from top flight football. We go behind the scenes with the team as they prepare for the opening game of the new season whilst also exploring the club’s unique history.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP08: (Subbed) PREMIER LEAGUE MAVERICKS
programme.sub-title: We delve into the careers of some of the most enigmatic and unpredictable footballers to have graced the English top-flight in recent years and find out how they became ‘Premier League mavericks’. We get under the skin of what made these players notorious, controversial and flamboyant and the impact they had in their time in England.

programme.title: 1-TO-11 EP20: EMMANUEL ADEBAYOR
programme.sub-title: Former Arsenal, Manchester City and Tottenham striker Emmanuel Adebayor had the honour of playing alongside some of the Premier League's greatest ever players and the African star sat down with Will Perry to select his all-time best eleven teammates.

programme.title: CLASSIC MATCH 18/19 WOL v ARS
programme.sub-title: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2018/2019 season.

programme.title: CLASSIC MATCH 14/15 TOT v LEI
programme.sub-title: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2014/2015 season.

programme.title: PREVIEW OF THE SEASON 2024/2025
programme.sub-title: As the excitement and anticipation builds ahead of the new Premier League campaign, get a detailed overview of how all 20 clubs are set – offering insight and analysis on new signings, newly promoted teams and much, much more. Preview of the Season is the perfect guide to what awaits all Premier League fans.

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON 2023/2024 (MNC)
programme.sub-title: The 2023/24 Premier League season will be forever remembered as one of the greatest campaigns ever. From an absorbing title race, Jürgen Klopp leaving Liverpool to Luton living the dream in the top-flight – Review of the Season documents all of the thrilling stories to emerge across the 380 matches.

programme.title: WELCOME TO THE WEEKEND Best Of Welcome To The Weekend #3
programme.sub-title: The Welcome to the Weekend team showcase their best bits from the 23/24 season. Olivia builds Lego with Brentford captain Christian Norgaard, Amadou Onana ranks some of his freshest fits and JJ is on the golf course with Luton’s Carlton Morris and Tom Lockyer.

programme.title: WELCOME TO THE WEEKEND Best Of Welcome To The Weekend #4
programme.sub-title: The Welcome to the Weekend team showcase their best bits from the 23/24 season. Hollywood superstars Bryan Cranston and Bryce Dallas Howard guess what happens next with some iconic Premier League moments, Eberechi Eze and Jean-Phillipe Mateta play out an epic game of Target Practice plus Nigerian musician Kcee brings the vibes to the studio.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW32 Crystal Palace v Manchester City
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW32 Manchester United v Liverpool
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: CLASSIC MATCH 13/14 MUN v LIV
programme.sub-title: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2013/2014 season.

programme.title: PREVIEW OF THE SEASON 2024/2025
programme.sub-title: As the excitement and anticipation builds ahead of the new Premier League campaign, get a detailed overview of how all 20 clubs are set – offering insight and analysis on new signings, newly promoted teams and much, much more. Preview of the Season is the perfect guide to what awaits all Premier League fans.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW32 Crystal Palace v Manchester City
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW32 Manchester United v Liverpool
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: WELCOME TO THE WEEKEND Best Of Welcome To The Weekend #4
programme.sub-title: The Welcome to the Weekend team showcase their best bits from the 23/24 season. Hollywood superstars Bryan Cranston and Bryce Dallas Howard guess what happens next with some iconic Premier League moments, Eberechi Eze and Jean-Phillipe Mateta play out an epic game of Target Practice plus Nigerian musician Kcee brings the vibes to the studio.

programme.title: WELCOME TO THE WEEKEND Best Of Welcome To The Weekend #3
programme.sub-title: The Welcome to the Weekend team showcase their best bits from the 23/24 season. Olivia builds Lego with Brentford captain Christian Norgaard, Amadou Onana ranks some of his freshest fits and JJ is on the golf course with Luton’s Carlton Morris and Tom Lockyer.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP08: (Subbed) PREMIER LEAGUE MAVERICKS
programme.sub-title: We delve into the careers of some of the most enigmatic and unpredictable footballers to have graced the English top-flight in recent years and find out how they became ‘Premier League mavericks’. We get under the skin of what made these players notorious, controversial and flamboyant and the impact they had in their time in England.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP10: IPSWICH TOWN
programme.sub-title: In the first senior manager’s job of his career, Kieran McKenna has achieved something nobody else has managed this decade: Winning back-to-back promotions from League One to the Premier League, in the process ending Ipswich’s 22-year absence from top flight football. We go behind the scenes with the team as they prepare for the opening game of the new season whilst also exploring the club’s unique history.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW32 Crystal Palace v Manchester City
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW32 Manchester United v Liverpool
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: CLASSIC MATCH 13/14 MUN v LIV
programme.sub-title: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2013/2014 season.

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON 2013/2014 (MNC)
programme.sub-title: A review of all the best goals, action and drama from Premier League seasons past.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW33 Newcastle United v Tottenham Hotspur
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW33 Chelsea v Everton
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP04: JOHN TERRY HALL OF FAME SPECIAL
programme.sub-title: Considered a legend at Stamford Bridge, John Terry won no fewer than five League titles at Chelsea as well as lifting the F.A. Cup five times and the Champions League trophy. We find out what set him apart from his peers and where he rates amongst the very best in the World.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP02: ASHLEY COLE HALL OF FAME SPECIAL
programme.sub-title: With 3 Premier League titles, Ashley Cole is widely regarded as one of the best defenders to have played in the League. We sit down with the Englishman to discuss the moments that made him a legend and helped him rightly earn his place in the Premier League Hall of Fame.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP48: HALL OF FAME 2024 INDUCTEES
programme.sub-title: We head to London to go behind the scenes at the Premier League Hall of fame event night and meet the three newest inductees to secure their place amongst English footballs elite!

programme.title: WELCOME TO THE WEEKEND Best Of Welcome To The Weekend #4
programme.sub-title: The Welcome to the Weekend team showcase their best bits from the 23/24 season. Hollywood superstars Bryan Cranston and Bryce Dallas Howard guess what happens next with some iconic Premier League moments, Eberechi Eze and Jean-Phillipe Mateta play out an epic game of Target Practice plus Nigerian musician Kcee brings the vibes to the studio.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP06: THE ENTERTAINERS
programme.sub-title: Nicknamed ‘The Entertainers’, Kevin Keegan’s Newcastle team of the 1995-96 season set the Premier League alight with their confidence and flair that took them agonisingly close to winning their first Premier League title. In this show, we speak to those that were part of that incredible journey and reflect on some of those unforgettable moments that captured hearts and forever changing the club's legacy.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW33 Newcastle United v Tottenham Hotspur
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW33 Chelsea v Everton
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP33: (Subbed) EIDUR GUDJOHNSEN
programme.sub-title: PL Stories heads to Iceland to meet the first, and only Icelandic Premier League, winner Eidur Gudjohnsen. With the help of his father Arnor, as well as friends Gudni Bergsson and Lárus Sigurðsson, Gudjohnsen reflects on the origins of a decorated career which was almost derailed by a devastating leg break.

programme.title: PREVIEW OF THE SEASON 2024/2025
programme.sub-title: As the excitement and anticipation builds ahead of the new Premier League campaign, get a detailed overview of how all 20 clubs are set – offering insight and analysis on new signings, newly promoted teams and much, much more. Preview of the Season is the perfect guide to what awaits all Premier League fans.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP10: IPSWICH TOWN
programme.sub-title: In the first senior manager’s job of his career, Kieran McKenna has achieved something nobody else has managed this decade: Winning back-to-back promotions from League One to the Premier League, in the process ending Ipswich’s 22-year absence from top flight football. We go behind the scenes with the team as they prepare for the opening game of the new season whilst also exploring the club’s unique history.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP06: THE ENTERTAINERS
programme.sub-title: Nicknamed ‘The Entertainers’, Kevin Keegan’s Newcastle team of the 1995-96 season set the Premier League alight with their confidence and flair that took them agonisingly close to winning their first Premier League title. In this show, we speak to those that were part of that incredible journey and reflect on some of those unforgettable moments that captured hearts and forever changing the club's legacy.

programme.sub-title: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2013/2014 season.

programme.sub-title: With 3 Premier League titles, Ashley Cole is widely regarded as one of the best defenders to have played in the League. We sit down with the Englishman to discuss the moments that made him a legend and helped him rightly earn his place in the Premier League Hall of Fame.

programme.sub-title: Former Leicester City stars Wes Morgan and Marc Albrighton explain the key moments in a Premier League season that stunned the world.

programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW34 Brighton & Hove Albion v Manchester City
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: PL RIVALRIES EP03: MCI v CHE
programme.sub-title: Will Perry is joined by former Chelsea player Scott Minto and Manchester City icon Shaun Wright-Phillips as they delve into the memorable moments, and rivalries between the two giants of English football.

programme.title: WELCOME TO THE WEEKEND Best Of Welcome To The Weekend #4
programme.sub-title: The Welcome to the Weekend team showcase their best bits from the 23/24 season. Hollywood superstars Bryan Cranston and Bryce Dallas Howard guess what happens next with some iconic Premier League moments, Eberechi Eze and Jean-Phillipe Mateta play out an epic game of Target Practice plus Nigerian musician Kcee brings the vibes to the studio.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP10: IPSWICH TOWN
programme.sub-title: In the first senior manager’s job of his career, Kieran McKenna has achieved something nobody else has managed this decade: Winning back-to-back promotions from League One to the Premier League, in the process ending Ipswich’s 22-year absence from top flight football. We go behind the scenes with the team as they prepare for the opening game of the new season whilst also exploring the club’s unique history.

programme.title: PL REWIND EP17: AVL v WHU 02/03
programme.sub-title: Dion Dublin and Lee Hendrie join Steve Bower to look back on a memorable day for Aston Villa from November 2002.

programme.title: PL REWIND EP04: TOT v LEI 03/04
programme.sub-title: Les Ferdinand joins Steve Bower to look back at a blockbuster encounter between Spurs and Leicester from the 2003/04 season.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS EP01: LEICESTER CITY 15/16
programme.sub-title: Former Leicester City stars Wes Morgan and Marc Albrighton explain the key moments in a Premier League season that stunned the world.

programme.title: PREVIEW OF THE SEASON 2024/2025
programme.sub-title: As the excitement and anticipation builds ahead of the new Premier League campaign, get a detailed overview of how all 20 clubs are set – offering insight and analysis on new signings, newly promoted teams and much, much more. Preview of the Season is the perfect guide to what awaits all Premier League fans.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP43: (Subbed) FOXES FANTASY WORLD
programme.sub-title: After watching their already relegated side lose to the Invincibles on the last day of the 2003/4 Premier League season, some Leicester City fans stayed behind to watch Arsenal lift the trophy at Highbury. Those fans endured ten years in the wilderness, only for Leicester to return to the big time and embark on a rollercoaster couple of years. In that time they completed the great escape after being dead and buried at the foot of the table and then followed that up with the most unthinkable of Premier League triumphs. This is their story, one of sports greatest triumphs, told by those who wrote it.

programme.title: PL REWIND EP04: TOT v LEI 03/04
programme.sub-title: Les Ferdinand joins Steve Bower to look back at a blockbuster encounter between Spurs and Leicester from the 2003/04 season.

programme.title: PL REWIND EP17: AVL v WHU 02/03
programme.sub-title: Dion Dublin and Lee Hendrie join Steve Bower to look back on a memorable day for Aston Villa from November 2002.

programme.sub-title: This week on PL Rewind we bring you highlights from some of the most memorable North London Derby clashes between Arsenal and Tottenham.

programme.sub-title: This week on PL Rewind we bring you highlights from some of the most memorable Manchester Derbies in the Premier League era.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP10: IPSWICH TOWN
programme.sub-title: In the first senior manager’s job of his career, Kieran McKenna has achieved something nobody else has managed this decade: Winning back-to-back promotions from League One to the Premier League, in the process ending Ipswich’s 22-year absence from top flight football. We go behind the scenes with the team as they prepare for the opening game of the new season whilst also exploring the club’s unique history.

programme.title: CLASSIC MATCH 01/02 IPS v LIV
programme.sub-title: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2001/2002 season as Liverpool faced Ipswich Town at Portman Road.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW37 Aston Villa v Liverpool
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.sub-title: Dion Dublin and Lee Hendrie join Steve Bower to look back on a memorable day for Aston Villa from November 2002.

programme.sub-title: Will Perry is joined by former Chelsea player Scott Minto and Manchester City icon Shaun Wright-Phillips as they delve into the memorable moments, and rivalries between the two giants of English football.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW12 Chelsea v Manchester City
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW25 Manchester City v Chelsea
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP06: THE ENTERTAINERS
programme.sub-title: Nicknamed ‘The Entertainers’, Kevin Keegan’s Newcastle team of the 1995-96 season set the Premier League alight with their confidence and flair that took them agonisingly close to winning their first Premier League title. In this show, we speak to those that were part of that incredible journey and reflect on some of those unforgettable moments that captured hearts and forever changing the club's legacy.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP09: (Subbed) HWANG HEE-CHAN
programme.sub-title: Hwang Hee-chan has risen through the ranks in the English Premier League over the last few seasons and has become a Wolves fans favourite. Premier League Stories recently went behind the scenes to experience a day in the life of this burgeoning South Korean star, who will once again be a key player in his clubs Premier League plans.

programme.title: PL REWIND EP17: AVL v WHU 02/03
programme.sub-title: Dion Dublin and Lee Hendrie join Steve Bower to look back on a memorable day for Aston Villa from November 2002.

programme.title: PL REWIND EP04: TOT v LEI 03/04
programme.sub-title: Les Ferdinand joins Steve Bower to look back at a blockbuster encounter between Spurs and Leicester from the 2003/04 season.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP11: JARRED GILLETT - THROUGH THE EYES OF A REFEREE
programme.sub-title: Jarred Gillett made history earlier this year when he became the first Premier League referee ever to be fitted with a special head-mounted camera during Crystal Palace’s home victory over Manchester United. PL Stories is granted exclusive access to Gillet and his officiating team on matchday, offering fans a unique insight into refereeing at the highest level. Premier League match officials and in particular referees are often the most scrutinised individuals in the game and this show reveals how difficult a task they have.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP10: IPSWICH TOWN
programme.sub-title: In the first senior manager’s job of his career, Kieran McKenna has achieved something nobody else has managed this decade: Winning back-to-back promotions from League One to the Premier League, in the process ending Ipswich’s 22-year absence from top flight football. We go behind the scenes with the team as they prepare for the opening game of the new season whilst also exploring the club’s unique history.

programme.title: CLASSIC MATCH 01/02 IPS v LIV
programme.sub-title: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2001/2002 season as Liverpool faced Ipswich Town at Portman Road.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW38 Manchester City v West Ham United
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: WELCOME TO THE WEEKEND Best Of Welcome To The Weekend #4
programme.sub-title: The Welcome to the Weekend team showcase their best bits from the 23/24 season. Hollywood superstars Bryan Cranston and Bryce Dallas Howard guess what happens next with some iconic Premier League moments, Eberechi Eze and Jean-Phillipe Mateta play out an epic game of Target Practice plus Nigerian musician Kcee brings the vibes to the studio.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS EP01: LEICESTER CITY 15/16
programme.sub-title: Former Leicester City stars Wes Morgan and Marc Albrighton explain the key moments in a Premier League season that stunned the world.

programme.title: PL REWIND EP28: PL RAW SPECIAL #4
programme.sub-title: This week on Rewind we look back at some fantastic action through the PL RAW Lens: fixtures include a west London Derby between Chelsea and Fulham, and a six-goal thriller at Anfield as Liverpool hosted Newcastle.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP09: (Subbed) HWANG HEE-CHAN
programme.sub-title: Hwang Hee-chan has risen through the ranks in the English Premier League over the last few seasons and has become a Wolves fans favourite. Premier League Stories recently went behind the scenes to experience a day in the life of this burgeoning South Korean star, who will once again be a key player in his clubs Premier League plans.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP11: JARRED GILLETT - THROUGH THE EYES OF A REFEREE
programme.sub-title: Jarred Gillett made history earlier this year when he became the first Premier League referee ever to be fitted with a special head-mounted camera during Crystal Palace’s home victory over Manchester United. PL Stories is granted exclusive access to Gillet and his officiating team on matchday, offering fans a unique insight into refereeing at the highest level. Premier League match officials and in particular referees are often the most scrutinised individuals in the game and this show reveals how difficult a task they have.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW38 Manchester City v West Ham United
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW38 Arsenal v Everton
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS EP01: LEICESTER CITY 15/16
programme.sub-title: Former Leicester City stars Wes Morgan and Marc Albrighton explain the key moments in a Premier League season that stunned the world.

programme.title: 1-TO-11 EP05: DARREN BENT
programme.sub-title: Darren Bent sits down to select the best team they played with, guiding us through their picks from 1-to-11 and including insights and anecdotes from on and off the pitch.

programme.title: CLASSIC MATCH 01/02 IPS v LIV
programme.sub-title: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2001/2002 season as Liverpool faced Ipswich Town at Portman Road.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP10: IPSWICH TOWN
programme.sub-title: In the first senior manager’s job of his career, Kieran McKenna has achieved something nobody else has managed this decade: Winning back-to-back promotions from League One to the Premier League, in the process ending Ipswich’s 22-year absence from top flight football. We go behind the scenes with the team as they prepare for the opening game of the new season whilst also exploring the club’s unique history.

programme.title: PREVIEW OF THE SEASON 2024/2025
programme.sub-title: As the excitement and anticipation builds ahead of the new Premier League campaign, get a detailed overview of how all 20 clubs are set – offering insight and analysis on new signings, newly promoted teams and much, much more. Preview of the Season is the perfect guide to what awaits all Premier League fans.

programme.title: GOALS OF THE SEASON 2023/2024 (GB: HAALAND)
programme.sub-title: From free kicks to bicycle kicks, relive some of the most memorable strikes from 2023/24 in a Premier League season where there’s been a record number of goals scored.

programme.title: PL 100 DARREN BENT
programme.sub-title: Premier League 100, celebrates some of the leading names to have achieved iconic milestones within England’s top flight. From scoring over 100 goals, to making over 100 clean sheets, we speak to the legends that left their mark and reflect on the goals and saves that set them apart from their rivals

programme.title: 1-TO-11 EP05: DARREN BENT
programme.sub-title: Darren Bent sits down to select the best team they played with, guiding us through their picks from 1-to-11 and including insights and anecdotes from on and off the pitch.

programme.title: CLASSIC MATCH 01/02 IPS v LIV
programme.sub-title: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2001/2002 season as Liverpool faced Ipswich Town at Portman Road.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP10: IPSWICH TOWN
programme.sub-title: In the first senior manager’s job of his career, Kieran McKenna has achieved something nobody else has managed this decade: Winning back-to-back promotions from League One to the Premier League, in the process ending Ipswich’s 22-year absence from top flight football. We go behind the scenes with the team as they prepare for the opening game of the new season whilst also exploring the club’s unique history.

programme.title: PREVIEW OF THE SEASON 2024/2025
programme.sub-title: As the excitement and anticipation builds ahead of the new Premier League campaign, get a detailed overview of how all 20 clubs are set – offering insight and analysis on new signings, newly promoted teams and much, much more. Preview of the Season is the perfect guide to what awaits all Premier League fans.

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON 2023/2024 (MNC)
programme.sub-title: The 2023/24 Premier League season will be forever remembered as one of the greatest campaigns ever. From an absorbing title race, Jürgen Klopp leaving Liverpool to Luton living the dream in the top-flight – Review of the Season documents all of the thrilling stories to emerge across the 380 matches.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP48: HALL OF FAME 2024 INDUCTEES
programme.sub-title: We head to London to go behind the scenes at the Premier League Hall of fame event night and meet the three newest inductees to secure their place amongst English footballs elite!

programme.title: PL STORIES EP11: JARRED GILLETT - THROUGH THE EYES OF A REFEREE
programme.sub-title: Jarred Gillett made history earlier this year when he became the first Premier League referee ever to be fitted with a special head-mounted camera during Crystal Palace’s home victory over Manchester United. PL Stories is granted exclusive access to Gillet and his officiating team on matchday, offering fans a unique insight into refereeing at the highest level. Premier League match officials and in particular referees are often the most scrutinised individuals in the game and this show reveals how difficult a task they have.

programme.title: CLASSIC MATCH 01/02 IPS v LIV
programme.sub-title: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2001/2002 season as Liverpool faced Ipswich Town at Portman Road.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP10: IPSWICH TOWN
programme.sub-title: In the first senior manager’s job of his career, Kieran McKenna has achieved something nobody else has managed this decade: Winning back-to-back promotions from League One to the Premier League, in the process ending Ipswich’s 22-year absence from top flight football. We go behind the scenes with the team as they prepare for the opening game of the new season whilst also exploring the club’s unique history.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW EP01: HARRY CLARKE
programme.sub-title: Club legend Matt Holland is joined by Ipswich defender and hometown boy Harry Clarke out and about in Ipswich, as the Tractor Boys prepare for their long-awaited Premier League opener against Liverpool at Portman Road.

programme.title: PREVIEW OF THE SEASON 2024/2025
programme.sub-title: As the excitement and anticipation builds ahead of the new Premier League campaign, get a detailed overview of how all 20 clubs are set – offering insight and analysis on new signings, newly promoted teams and much, much more. Preview of the Season is the perfect guide to what awaits all Premier League fans.

programme.title: 1-TO-11 EP05: DARREN BENT
programme.sub-title: Darren Bent sits down to select the best team they played with, guiding us through their picks from 1-to-11 and including insights and anecdotes from on and off the pitch.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS EP01: LEICESTER CITY 15/16
programme.sub-title: Former Leicester City stars Wes Morgan and Marc Albrighton explain the key moments in a Premier League season that stunned the world.

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON 2023/2024 (MNC)
programme.sub-title: The 2023/24 Premier League season will be forever remembered as one of the greatest campaigns ever. From an absorbing title race, Jürgen Klopp leaving Liverpool to Luton living the dream in the top-flight – Review of the Season documents all of the thrilling stories to emerge across the 380 matches.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW EP01: HARRY CLARKE
programme.sub-title: Club legend Matt Holland is joined by Ipswich defender and hometown boy Harry Clarke out and about in Ipswich, as the Tractor Boys prepare for their long-awaited Premier League opener against Liverpool at Portman Road.

programme.sub-title: In the first senior manager’s job of his career, Kieran McKenna has achieved something nobody else has managed this decade: Winning back-to-back promotions from League One to the Premier League, in the process ending Ipswich’s 22-year absence from top flight football. We go behind the scenes with the team as they prepare for the opening game of the new season whilst also exploring the club’s unique history.

PL Stories is granted exclusive access to Gillet and his officiating team on matchday, offering fans a unique insight into refereeing at the highest level.
